# American Barber Institute — Website

A complete, modern rebuild of [abi.edu](https://www.abi.edu) (American Barber Institute, NYC's only dedicated barber school, est. 1996), preserving all original content, data, and photography from the existing WordPress site — repackaged with a premium barbershop aesthetic and trade-school conversion best practices.

## Stack

**Zero dependencies.** Hand-crafted static HTML/CSS/JS, generated by a small Python build script. No framework, no npm, no build chain to break. Deploys anywhere (Vercel, Netlify, S3, any static host) as-is.

- `build.py` — merges `src/pages/*.html` content partials into the shared base template (header, nav, footer, JSON-LD schema), and emits `sitemap.xml` + `robots.txt`
- `src/pages/` — per-page content partials
- `src/make_blog.py` — regenerates blog post partials from the archived original site (`~/Websites/abi-archive`)
- `src/make_gallery.py` — copies curated photos from the archive into `assets/img/` and regenerates the gallery page
- `assets/css/style.css` — the design system (single file, custom properties)
- `assets/js/main.js` — vanilla JS: mobile nav, dynamic next-start-date + countdown, lazy YouTube embeds, gallery lightbox, scroll reveals, stat count-ups, form handling

## Build & preview

```bash
python3 build.py                  # regenerate all pages
python3 -m http.server 8642       # preview at http://localhost:8642
```

## Design

- **Palette:** charcoal `#101316`, warm paper `#f6f1e7`, brand gold `#c9a227`, barber-pole oxblood/blue accents
- **Type:** Oswald (condensed display) + Inter (body), via Google Fonts
- **Patterns:** dark/gold premium barbershop aesthetic; program cards with hour badges; tuition tables with payment plans; dynamic "next class starts" countdown (always the first Monday of next month — never stale); sticky mobile Call/Tour bar; FAQ accordions with FAQPage schema; Course + TradeSchool/LocalBusiness JSON-LD

## Content source

All copy, prices, schedules, requirements, reviews, photos and videos were extracted from the original site via the Wayback Machine (the live site sits behind a bot checkpoint). The raw archive lives in `~/Websites/abi-archive/` (pages, extracted text, images, content inventory).

## Pages (31)

Home · About (story, mission, instructors, skills, virtual tour) · Admissions & Schedule · Financial Aid · Veterans (GI Bill®) · ACCESS-VR · Programs hub + 6 program pages · $3 Haircuts menu · Job Placement & Shop Registration · Gallery (229 photos) · FAQs · Contact & Directions · Resources · Privacy · Blog (9 original articles) · Spanish landing page (`/es/`)
